title: NeoShade
description: Modern visuals, shader-like look, zero FPS drop.
body:
✨ **Looks like** *shader*, **runs like** *vanilla*✨


Want to use shaders, but your PC turns into a slideshow the moment you
try?
Well, we’ve got something for you, Introducing Neoshade: a resource pack designed to give you a shader like look without killing your FPS. **No extra heat, no heavy RAM or GPU usage, Not gamemode exclusive, just smooth performance** with **better visuals**.

# FOR VERSION 1.1 OR ABOVE:

1. ### **Sodium Compatibility!**

2. ### Godrays require Polytone

![Requires Polytone](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0c2943dd1903e886e26d201750cbcebf99afde65.webp)

# FEATURES

• **Bloom (impure)** 

• **better fog**

• **Godrays** 

• **Custom sky** 

• **Shader-like lighting** 

• **Realistic looking shadows** 

• **Soft overhauled clouds** 

• **Shooting stars**

• **Bright and twinkling stars**

• **Heavy customization with respackopts support** 

• **Slanted Rain** 

## Visuals

• **Terrain - Sunrise**

![Terrain - Sunrise](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a04e7481922c2b110caa178f68c981cd9cce4db7.png)

• **Terrain - Sunset**

![Terrain - Sunset](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5715a9d2dd1e2254960c54753fbf819f15eb6195.png)

• **Clouds & Stars (overhauled night sky)**

![Overhauled Night sky](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ed1a32b9754e6a6a5c9a1894be0e1039b170c7ac_0.webp)

• **Sculk Emmisive**

![Sculk Emmisive](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4721b65c29c7e7682529a3f29f79d23ee599da95.png)

• **Shadows**

![Shadows](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5883f9e0d8544061d004bf1c0d73df75eb0b6686.png)

• **Godrays**

![Godrays with Polytone](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c9daf724868250131da22c469351bf07cf08b47d.png)




# Compability 
Sodium compatibility has been added to version 1.1 and above.

This pack is compatiable with **Distant Horizons** but with limitations (_lod chunks cannot work as they are not real chunks so, we can't do anything to resolve shading on it for now_).

# Why choose us over others?
**No huge fps loss** 

**Not gamemode specific** 

**Compability with sodium (v1.1 and above)** 

**FEATURES IN PROGRESS**
1. *PURE BLOOM* 
2. *END SKYS* 
3. *VANNILA IMMERSIVE* 
4. Water REFLECTIONS 

**Keep tuned for more** 🔥 


# How does it work and doesn't take fps?

Since Minecraft 1.17, Minecraft has given modders the ability to use vanilla core shaders to customise elements of the game such as shadows, lighting etc.and this resource pack cleverly utilises this by using smart and modern techniques to give a false shader like feeling this is also the reason why it doesn't need mods or take
fps as it's built into the game.

**Join the discord for sneak peeks, discussions, and support** 
https://discord.gg/xpYxWecBs


~ Editor/Director & Dev.
